title: Big Mobs
description: A couple of goofy mobs for your world
body:
DISCLAIMER: This mod does not add "big" or "giant" versions of pre-existing mobs.

 

Big Mobs is a Forge mod that introduces a variety of mobs to your Minecraft world. 

Current list of mobs:

 

- Colossal Carrot
- Goliath Frog
- Savannari
- The Roofer
- Seagull
- Big Zombie
- Shellbite
- Bord
- Obelisx
- Gravelett
- Nanamigo
- Enormous Eggplant
- Walker
- Parsnippet
- Tricky Chest

![The Big Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cce378e920783531231eae5530240dfdccaecce6.png)
 

Big Mobs Update VOTE !!!

Vote for a future Big Mobs update! 

[UPDATE VOTE Google Form Link]
(https://forms.gle/VjSyJESUMyWHDW7J6)


![Mobs Framed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7d69e84a01909b67d6255a6d7eb917e35b92ba7.png)

 

What to expect for the future of Big Mobs:

- more mobs + items
- improved models + animations
- unique drops for mobs
- potential roofer rework
- memorial structure replacement
- big mobs dex completion
- user suggestions

Shellbite and Walker idea by thegoldenking0 on discord

 

 



![BIG MOBS LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70c6be7277791e0f6dfe21129a7d5508d9f6207.png)
